title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy and Crew's new pirate ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Put it in!! Put it in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey! Is this room good or what?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: The ship continues its favorable voyage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, let's eat it as a snack.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A huge bathtub rocked by the waves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look!! It's got *treasure* written on it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: How can we tell without looking!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, it's probably alcohol. Let's drink it!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
